item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -eu
root='longhorizon-work/scenario-02'
printf 'current_json_mode='
jq -r '.mode' \""'$root/config/onboarding.json"
set +e
reversions=$(rg -n -i '"'batch' \""'$root" 2>&1)
reversion_exit=$?
set -e
if [ -n "$reversions" ]; then printf '"'%s\\n' \""'$reversions"; else printf '"'%s\\n' 'reversion_matches=(none)'; fi
printf 'search_exit=%s\\n' \""'$reversion_exit"'

/bin/zsh -lc "set -eu
root='longhorizon-work/scenario-02'
printf 'current_json_mode='
jq -r '.mode' \""'$root/config/onboarding.json"
set +e
reversions=$(rg -n -i '"'batch' \""'$root" 2>&1)
reversion_exit=$?
set -e
if [ -n "$reversions" ]; then printf '"'%s\\n' \""'$reversions"; else printf '"'%s\\n' 'reversion_matches=(none)'; fi
printf 'search_exit=%s\\n' \""'$reversion_exit"'
